name: Barbecued Beef Buns
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Cooked Beef Strips (2 x 1/4 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except the hamburger buns, in a 4-quart Dutch oven.
2. Cook over high heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 25 minutes or until the mixture thickens.
4. Remove lemon slices.
5. Pour into a container, cover, and refrigerate.
To Serve:
1. Warm over medium heat and serve in the hamburger buns.
